name: Poster Rotator
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.

versions.changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta while keeping plugin version 1.7.0.0. Scheduler: separates Download missing pools from Rotate pools; Rotate pools keeps the stable PosterRotator.RotatePostersTask key and only rotates existing indexed pools, while PosterRotator.DownloadMissingPoolsTask fills missing or incomplete pools first. Fix: Download missing pools now writes strictly through Jellyfin.Plugin.PosterRotator.pools, creates item folders only when an image is being written, removes empty failed folders, and adds a manual admin action to fill missing pools now. Security: manually validates remote image redirects and rejects uploads above MaxDownloadMegabytes before opening the stream. Packaging: includes meta.json and a local plugin image for manual zip installs. Performance: uses index-only listing for very large libraries, defers pool index writes during scheduled runs, caches diagnostics briefly, respects cooldowns, and allows MaxRotationsPerRun=0 as no per-run rotation cap. Interface: removes the separate Maintenance block, adds a delete-all-pools action, retries original bounded images when preview generation fails, keeps Pools as the default tab, and adds configurable language fallback controls.

Compatibility: target Jellyfin 10.11.0.0 for the full 10.11.x line. Security: bounded image downloads, safer URL validation, safe purge, and serialized rotation/purge operations. Performance: plugin-data pool storage with migration from media-folder .poster_pool directories and Jellyfin SaveImage rotation.
